Container.Name: Qwen3-ASR-API
Container.Overview: Pure OpenAI-compatible Speech-to-Text API powered by Qwen3-ASR via vLLM. State-of-the-art Chinese (22 dialects), English, and 50+ languages. No bloat — just the model and API. Switch between 0.6B (~2-3GB VRAM) and 1.7B (~4-6GB VRAM) via MODEL_ID. CUDA 12.8 (Blackwell/Ada). First start downloads model. Requires NVIDIA GPU with driver 570+.

Config.Name: API Port
Config.Description: OpenAI-compatible API port. Swagger docs at /docs

Config.Name: Model Cache
Config.Description: Model download cache. Persists across container recreates (~1-3GB).

Config.Name: Model ID
Config.Description: Qwen/Qwen3-ASR-0.6B (fast, ~2-3GB VRAM) or Qwen/Qwen3-ASR-1.7B (accurate, ~4-6GB VRAM). Restart required after change.

Config.Name: GPU Memory Utilization
Config.Description: Fraction of GPU memory to allocate (0.0-1.0). Lower if sharing GPU with other containers.
